caption: A man with long hair pulled back and wearing glasses performs in front of a light-colored wooden slatted wall. He is dressed in a white long-sleeved shirt and a dark embroidered vest. Across the sequence, the man is positioned behind a microphone on a stand. In the beginning, he holds the microphone close to his mouth with both hands, appearing to be singing or speaking. As the scene progresses, he lowers his hands and moves slightly away from the microphone, his expression shifting. A yellow guitar is partially visible in the lower foreground. The text "ORCA" appears in white capital letters on the right side of the frames. In the foreground, the tops of several people's heads are visible, indicating an audience. The camera remains stationary as the man's movements and facial expressions evolve throughout the short clip.
